name: ElevenLabs Scribe v2
blurb: High-accuracy STT across 90+ languages — batch and realtime APIs with diarisation, timestamps, and prompting.
about: Scribe v2 is ElevenLabs’ batch speech-to-text model for transcription, subtitling and captioning, with keyterm prompting, entity detection, speaker diarisation, word-level timestamps and automatic language detection across 90+ languages. It records 5.83% average WER on the Open ASR Leaderboard.

Scribe v2 Realtime covers the same broad language set with roughly 150 ms model latency for live agents and captions. API pricing is $0.22 per audio hour for Scribe and $0.39 per audio hour for Scribe v2 Realtime; entity detection and keyterm prompting cost extra. Prices change — check the pricing page.
